text: Congratulations on completing the Google Cloud Fundamentals: Core Infrastructure training course.
Before you go, let’s take a few minutes to review what we’ve covered.
In module 1, you were introduced to Google Cloud and cloud computing.
Specifically, you explored: The concept of managed infrastructure and managed services, through IaaS, infrastructure as a service, and PaaS, platform as a service.
Google Cloud’s focus on security throughout our infrastructure.
